scope: PHN-2197: Backend GET: POD list – Search of pods by Coordinates on Map view. Backend support for searching/filtering the POD list by geographic coordinates (e.g. bounding box or lat/long) for use in a map view.
entry_points: GET /pod/list (point-of-delivery-controller, operationId: search) – existing search endpoint; likely to be extended with coordinate/bbox query parameters for map view

PodSearchRequest (request DTO) – current required fields: consumptionPurposes, measurementTypes, page, podTypes, prompt, size, sortBy, sortDirection, voltageLevels; no coordinate fields in current backend-architecture.json

upstream.name: pod.pod
upstream.usage: POD entity; list/search reads from pod table

upstream.name: pod.pod_details
upstream.usage: POD version/details; address or location data may be stored here or in related address/location tables for coordinate filtering

upstream.name: point-of-delivery-controller
upstream.usage: Exposes GET /pod/list (search); must accept and apply coordinate/bbox filter

upstream.name: PointOfDeliveryService (or equivalent)
upstream.usage: Business logic for POD search; must support coordinate-based filtering

upstream.name: PodSearchRequest
upstream.usage: Request DTO; may be extended with latitude, longitude, bbox (minLat, maxLat, minLon, maxLon) or similar for map view

upstream.name: PagePointOfDeliveryFilterResponse
upstream.usage: Paged response for POD list; content type PointOfDeliveryFilterResponse (id, detailId)

upstream.name: POD location/address schema
upstream.usage: If coordinates are stored (e.g. in pod_details or address tables), repository queries must filter by bbox/coordinates

upstream.name: Auth / permissions
upstream.usage: Same as existing /pod/list; caller must have permission to list PODs

downstream.name: Map view UI (frontend)
downstream.usage: Calls GET /pod/list with coordinate/bbox params to display PODs on map

downstream.name: GET /pod/{id}
downstream.usage: Detail view; map may link to POD detail

downstream.name: Sales portal / Phoenix UI
downstream.usage: POD listing and map view; contract flows that select POD from map

downstream.name: Contract–POD APIs
downstream.usage: product-contract, service-contract, express-contract; map-selected POD may be used in contract creation

downstream.name: EnergoTS / API tests
downstream.usage: Tests for /pod/list may need to cover new query params (coordinates/bbox)

data_entities: Address/location data if stored for POD (for coordinate filtering)
integration_points: Frontend map view → GET /api/pod/list?…&bbox=… or lat/lon params
Contract creation flows that use POD list (e.g. select POD from map)
Existing /pod/list callers (must remain compatible if new params are optional)

what_could_break.reason: If new coordinate params change request contract or validation, existing clients without these params must still work (backward compatibility)
Combining coordinate filter with page/size/sortBy/sortDirection must be consistent; performance of geo queries
If coordinates are optional on POD, map view must handle missing location data; filter behaviour (exclude vs include null)

what_could_break.item: Contract and termination flows that list or select POD
what_could_break.reason: UI that reuse POD list (e.g. dropdown vs map) must work with same or extended API
New optional params should be covered; existing tests must not break
